at the moment the horses are all over the place - what would be perfect is once the Start race is selected - each horse individually is loaded into their barrier - a red light flashes on top of the barrier - the race starts - the horses race as per normal - they stay within the track and cross the finishing line

ChatGPT said:

Yep — straight line is the right call here. I’ll keep the improved UI and ticker, but rebuild the race itself around proper starting barriers, a flashing red light, and horses staying neatly in their lanes until they cross the finish.

Absolutely mate — this is the better direction. Below is the full straight-line version with:

  • Horses loaded into individual barriers

  • Red light flashes before start

  • Horses stay in their lanes

  • Clear finishing line

  • Everything else kept the same

Replace your full index.html with this:

HTML
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Horse Race Slot Game</title>

<style>
* { box-sizing: border-box; }

body {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
  background: #1b5e20;
  color: white;
  text-align: center;
}

h1 { margin: 14px 0 6px; }

.account-panel {
  position: fixed;
  top: 12px;
  right: 12px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  padding: 12px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  z-index: 100;
}

.balance { font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 8px; }

.controls {
  margin: 12px auto;
  padding: 12px;
  max-width: 780px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.22);
  border-radius: 14px;
}

select, input, button {
  padding: 9px 12px;
  font-size: 16px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  margin: 4px;
}

button {
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: bold;
}

.start-btn {
  font-size: 22px;
  padding: 14px 36px;
  background: gold;
  color: #1b5e20;
  margin-top: 10px;
}

.payout {
  color: #ffeb3b;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin-top: 8px;
}

.ticker-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #0b3d13;
  border-top: 2px solid gold;
  border-bottom: 2px solid gold;
  padding: 8px 0;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

.ticker {
  display: flex;
  width: max-content;
  animation: tickerMove 26s linear infinite;
}

.ticker span {
  white-space: nowrap;
  padding-right: 80px;
  font-weight: bold;
}

@keyframes tickerMove {
  from { transform: translateX(0); }
  to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

.track-area {
  width: min(95vw, 1200px);
  margin: 22px auto;
  background: #2e7d32;
  border: 10px solid #1b3d1f;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 18px;
  position: relative;
}

.race-lane {
  position: relative;
  height: 76px;
  background: #7a4f2a;
  border-bottom: 3px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.race-lane:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

.race-lane.selected {
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 4px gold;
}

.start-barrier {
  position: absolute;
  left: 8px;
  top: 8px;
  width: 74px;
  height: 60px;
  background: #263238;
  border: 2px solid white;
  border-radius: 6px;
  z-index: 4;
}

.barrier-number {
  position: absolute;
  top: 2px;
  left: 6px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: gold;
}

.red-light {
  position: absolute;
  top: -12px;
  left: 28px;
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  background: #5c0000;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid #111;
}

.red-light.flash {
  animation: flashRed 0.35s alternate infinite;
}

@keyframes flashRed {
  from { background: #5c0000; }
  to { background: red; box-shadow: 0 0 16px red; }
}

.runner {
  position: absolute;
  left: 24px;
  top: 9px;
  width: 190px;
  text-align: center;
  z-index: 5;
  transition: left 3s ease-out;
}

.horse-name {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: bold;
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px black;
}

.horse {
  font-size: 34px;
  transform: scaleX(-1);
}

.finish-line {
  position: absolute;
  right: 70px;
  top: 0;
  width: 12px;
  height: 100%;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
    to bottom,
    white 0 10px,
    black 10px 20px
  );
  z-index: 8;
}

.modal {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.82);
  display: none;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  z-index: 1000;
}

.modal.show { display: flex; }

.race-modal-content {
  width: 96vw;
  height: 94vh;
  text-align: center;
}

.race-modal-content .track-area {
  width: 94vw;
  height: auto;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

.history-box {
  background: #1f5f24;
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  width: min(700px, 92vw);
  max-height: 85vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
  text-align: left;
}

.history-entry {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  padding: 10px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.big-win {
  position: fixed;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  background: gold;
  color: #1b5e20;
  padding: 30px 45px;
  border-radius: 18px;
  font-size: 34px;
  font-weight: bold;
  z-index: 2000;
  animation: pop 1.4s ease-out forwards;
}

@keyframes pop {
  0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(.4); opacity: 0; }
  50% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2); opacity: 1; }
  100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); opacity: 0; }
}
</style>
</head>

<body>

<h1>🐎 Horse Race Slot Game</h1>

<div class="account-panel">
  <div class="balance">Balance: $<span id="balance">50.00</span></div>
  <button onclick="topUp()">Free $50 Top Up</button>
</div>

<div class="controls">
  <label>Pick a horse:</label>
  <select id="horseSelect"></select>

  <label>Bet Amount ($):</label>
  <input type="number" id="betAmount" min="1" step="1">

  <div class="payout" id="payout"></div>

  <button class="start-btn" onclick="startRace()">START RACE</button>
  <button onclick="openHistory()">Race History (Last 5)</button>
</div>

<div class="ticker-wrap">
  <div class="ticker" id="ticker"></div>
</div>

<div class="track-area" id="previewTrack"></div>

<div class="modal" id="historyModal">
  <div class="history-box">
    <h2>Race History</h2>
    <div id="historyContent"></div>
    <button onclick="closeHistory()">Close</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="modal" id="raceModal">
  <div class="race-modal-content">
    <h2 id="raceSummary">Live Race</h2>
    <div class="track-area" id="raceTrack"></div>
    <button id="closeRaceBtn" onclick="closeRace()" style="display:none;">Close</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const namePool = [
  "Champagne Calling", "La Veuve", "Arabian Legacy", "Aspen Colorado",
  "Aurora Sunset", "Cadbury Castle", "Chequered Love", "Down The Barrel",
  "Extra Brut", "Merlin's Melody", "Mr No Nay", "My Lancelot",
  "My Matterhorn", "Naval Officer", "Nightsphere", "Ready By Design",
  "Sassy Rebel", "So Poysed", "Tango and Cash", "Tough Judge",
  "Trump This", "Uluru", "Dawn Rider", "Gaga's Girl", "Love Rustler"
];

let horses = [];
let balance = Number(localStorage.getItem("balance")) || 50;
let lastTopUp = Number(localStorage.getItem("lastTopUp")) || null;
let history = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("history")) || [];
let raceInProgress = false;

const balanceSpan = document.getElementById("balance");
const horseSelect = document.getElementById("horseSelect");
const betInput = document.getElementById("betAmount");
const payout = document.getElementById("payout");
const ticker = document.getElementById("ticker");
const previewTrack = document.getElementById("previewTrack");
const raceTrack = document.getElementById("raceTrack");

function formatMoney(n) {
  return "$" + n.toFixed(2);
}

function saveBalance() {
  balanceSpan.textContent = balance.toFixed(2);
  localStorage.setItem("balance", balance);
}

function randomOdds() {
  return Number((Math.random() * 12 + 1.5).toFixed(2));
}

function generateHorses() {
  const shuffled = [...namePool].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
  horses = shuffled.slice(0, 6).map((name, i) => ({
    name,
    odds: randomOdds(),
    barrier: i + 1
  }));
}

function weightedWinner() {
  const total = horses.reduce((s, h) => s + 1 / h.odds, 0);
  let r = Math.random() * total;

  for (let i = 0; i < horses.length; i++) {
    r -= 1 / horses[i].odds;
    if (r <= 0) return i;
  }

  return horses.length - 1;
}

function buildTrack(trackEl) {
  trackEl.innerHTML = "";

  const finish = document.createElement("div");
  finish.className = "finish-line";
  trackEl.appendChild(finish);

  const selected = Number(horseSelect.value);

  horses.forEach((horse, i) => {
    const lane = document.createElement("div");
    lane.className = "race-lane" + (selected === i ? " selected" : "");

    const barrier = document.createElement("div");
    barrier.className = "start-barrier";
    barrier.innerHTML = `
      <div class="red-light"></div>
      <div class="barrier-number">${horse.barrier}</div>
    `;

    const runner = document.createElement("div");
    runner.className = "runner";
    runner.id = "runner-" + i;
    runner.innerHTML = `
      <div class="horse-name">${horse.barrier}. ${horse.name}</div>
      <div class="horse">🐎</div>
    `;

    lane.appendChild(barrier);
    lane.appendChild(runner);
    trackEl.appendChild(lane);
  });
}

function setupRace() {
  generateHorses();

  horseSelect.innerHTML = "";
  horses.forEach((h, i) => {
    const opt = document.createElement("option");
    opt.value = i;
    opt.textContent = `Barrier ${h.barrier} - ${h.name} (${formatMoney(h.odds)})`;
    horseSelect.appendChild(opt);
  });

  const tickerText = horses
    .map(h => `🐎 Barrier ${h.barrier}: ${h.name} — ${formatMoney(h.odds)}`)
    .join(" &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; | &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; ");

  ticker.innerHTML = `<span>${tickerText}</span><span>${tickerText}</span>`;

  updatePayout();
  buildTrack(previewTrack);
}

function updatePayout() {
  const bet = Number(betInput.value);
  const selected = Number(horseSelect.value);

  if (!bet || !horses[selected]) {
    payout.textContent = "";
  } else {
    payout.textContent = "Potential payout: " + formatMoney(bet * horses[selected].odds);
  }

  buildTrack(previewTrack);
}

function loadIntoBarriers(trackEl) {
  trackEl.querySelectorAll(".runner").forEach(runner => {
    runner.style.transition = "left 0.8s ease-in";
    runner.style.left = "24px";
  });
}

function flashLights(trackEl) {
  trackEl.querySelectorAll(".red-light").forEach(light => {
    light.classList.add("flash");
  });
}

function stopLights(trackEl) {
  trackEl.querySelectorAll(".red-light").forEach(light => {
    light.classList.remove("flash");
    light.style.background = "green";
    light.style.boxShadow = "0 0 16px lime";
  });
}

function startRace() {
  if (raceInProgress) return;

  const bet = Number(betInput.value);
  const selected = Number(horseSelect.value);

  if (!bet || bet <= 0) return alert("Enter a valid bet amount");
  if (bet > balance) return alert("Insufficient balance");

  balance -= bet;
  saveBalance();

  const winner = weightedWinner();
  raceInProgress = true;

  document.getElementById("raceModal").classList.add("show");
  document.getElementById("closeRaceBtn").style.display = "none";
  document.getElementById("raceSummary").textContent =
    `Selected: Barrier ${horses[selected].barrier} - ${horses[selected].name} | Bet: ${formatMoney(bet)}`;

  buildTrack(raceTrack);
  loadIntoBarriers(raceTrack);

  setTimeout(() => {
    flashLights(raceTrack);
  }, 700);

  setTimeout(() => {
    stopLights(raceTrack);

    const trackWidth = raceTrack.clientWidth;
    const finishPosition = trackWidth - 115;

    horses.forEach((_, i) => {
      const runner = raceTrack.querySelector("#runner-" + i);
      runner.style.transition = "left 3s ease-out";

      if (i === winner) {
        runner.style.left = finishPosition + "px";
      } else {
        runner.style.left = (finishPosition - 180 - Math.random() * 180) + "px";
      }
    });

    setTimeout(() => {
      finishRace(selected, winner, bet);
    }, 3200);
  }, 2200);
}

function finishRace(selected, winner, bet) {
  let winnings = 0;

  if (selected === winner) {
    winnings = bet * horses[winner].odds;
    balance += winnings;
    saveBalance();

    if (horses[winner].odds > 10) {
      showBigWin(winnings);
    }
  }

  history.unshift({
    winner: `Barrier ${horses[winner].barrier} - ${horses[winner].name}`,
    odds: formatMoney(horses[winner].odds),
    picked: `Barrier ${horses[selected].barrier} - ${horses[selected].name}`,
    winnings: winnings.toFixed(2)
  });

  history = history.slice(0, 5);
  localStorage.setItem("history", JSON.stringify(history));

  document.getElementById("raceSummary").textContent =
    `Winner: Barrier ${horses[winner].barrier} - ${horses[winner].name} (${formatMoney(horses[winner].odds)}) | Your pick: ${horses[selected].name} | Winnings: ${formatMoney(winnings)}`;

  document.getElementById("closeRaceBtn").style.display = "inline-block";
  raceInProgress = false;

  setupRace();
}

function showBigWin(amount) {
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.className = "big-win";
  div.textContent = `BIG WIN! ${formatMoney(amount)}`;
  document.body.appendChild(div);
  setTimeout(() => div.remove(), 1400);
}

function topUp() {
  const now = Date.now();

  if (lastTopUp && now - lastTopUp < 86400000) {
    alert("Only 1 free top is allowed within 24 hours. Please wait and try again later");
    return;
  }

  balance += 50;
  lastTopUp = now;
  localStorage.setItem("lastTopUp", lastTopUp);
  saveBalance();
}

function openHistory() {
  const content = document.getElementById("historyContent");

  if (!history.length) {
    content.innerHTML = "<p>No races yet.</p>";
  } else {
    content.innerHTML = history.map(h => `
      <div class="history-entry">
        🏁 Winner: ${h.winner} (${h.odds})<br>
        🎯 Picked: ${h.picked}<br>
        💰 Winnings: $${h.winnings}
      </div>
    `).join("");
  }

  document.getElementById("historyModal").classList.add("show");
}

function closeHistory() {
  document.getElementById("historyModal").classList.remove("show");
}

function closeRace() {
  if (!raceInProgress) {
    document.getElementById("raceModal").classList.remove("show");
  }
}

horseSelect.addEventListener("change", updatePayout);
betInput.addEventListener("input", updatePayout);

saveBalance();
setupRace();
</script>

</body>
</html>

This should feel much more like:

barriers → flashing red light → green/go → straight race → finish line.


You said:

This is just super mate - well done

ChatGPT said:

Thanks mate! 😄

And honestly, you've done the hard part by having a clear vision for what you wanted. The progression has been pretty natural:

  • Started as a simple random horse picker

  • Added odds

  • Added betting

  • Added account balance

  • Added persistence

  • Added race history

  • Added barrier numbers

  • Added pre-race sequence

  • Added full-screen race view

  • Added personalised horse names

  • Added ticker tape

  • Added proper starting barriers and lights

It's actually starting to feel like a genuine little racing game now.

A few ideas I'd put on the "future enhancements" list

🏇 Photo finish

  • If 2 horses finish very close together, show a "Photo Finish" banner for 2 seconds before announcing the winner.

🎙️ Race Caller

  • Display commentary during the race:

    • "They're off!"

    • "Champagne Calling takes an early lead!"

    • "Merlin's Melody is making ground on the outside!"

    • "Down The Barrel wins!"

🎨 Horse Colours

  • Each horse gets a random silk colour.

  • Makes it much easier to follow them.

🎵 Sound

  • Barrier bell

  • Crowd noise

  • Hoofbeats

  • Big Win fanfare

📈 Statistics

  • Total races

  • Wins

  • Win %

  • Biggest payout

  • Current bankroll

  • Highest bankroll

🏆 Hall of Fame

  • Biggest ever win

  • Highest odds winner

  • Longest winning streak

💾 Export / Import

  • Save your bankroll and history to a file.

  • Restore later.

The one thing I'd personally tackle next is race commentary.

It would make a huge difference for very little code.

Imagine:

🔴 Loading horses...

🔴 Red light...

🟢 They're off!

🐎 Sassy Rebel jumps well!

🐎 Tango and Cash moves into second!

🐎 Uluru takes the lead approaching the finish!

🏆 Uluru wins!

That would make the race feel alive.

But for now, mate, I'd take a moment and enjoy it. You've gone from an idea to a working, persistent, personalised racing game that you can host on GitHub Pages. That's pretty cool. 🏇🍻


You said:

I love these suggestions... can we really - Photo finish? - Race Caller (that would be so cool)? - Horse Colours? - Sounds? This would take it to the next level mate

ChatGPT said:

Yes mate — 100% we can do all four 😄

✅ Photo finish

We can make close races trigger:

📸 PHOTO FINISH!

Then delay the winner announcement by a second or two for drama.

✅ Race Caller

Very doable. We can add live text like:

“They’re loaded…”
“Red light flashing…”
“They’re off!”
“Uluru is flying down the outside!”
“Champagne Calling hits the line!”

✅ Horse colours

Each horse can get a random coloured “silk”/badge so they’re easier to follow:

  • red

  • blue

  • yellow

  • purple

  • green

  • pink

✅ Sounds

Yes — even without sound files, we can use browser-generated sounds:

  • beep for red light

  • start bell

  • gallop rhythm

  • win sound

  • big win fanfare

Best next move: I’ll add these one at a time, starting with Race Caller + Horse Colours, because they’re the safest and will instantly improve the feel without risking the game logic.

Then we add Photo Finish, then Sounds.


You said:

OK lets do it mate

ChatGPT said:

Love it — I’ll fold these in as a single upgrade while keeping your existing balance, odds, history, top-up, ticker, barriers, and race flow intact. This version adds colour silks, live race commentary, photo-finish drama, and browser-generated sound effects.

Absolutely mate — here’s the next-level version:

HTML
<!-- Replace your entire index.html with the full code below -->

I’ve added:

  • 📸 Photo finish

  • 🎙️ Race caller

  • 🎨 Horse colours / silks

  • 🔊 Sound effects

  • 🏇 Existing betting, balance, top-up, history, ticker, barriers all kept

Because the full code is quite long, I recommend copying it from the updated canvas version rather than trying to patch bits manually.


You said:

excellent - can I please have the code?

ChatGPT said:

Absolutely mate — here’s the full upgraded code.

Copy this whole thing into index.html:

HTML
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Horse Race Slot Game</title>

<style>
* { box-sizing: border-box; }

body {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
  background: #1b5e20;
  color: white;
  text-align: center;
}

h1 { margin: 14px 0 6px; }

.account-panel {
  position: fixed;
  top: 12px;
  right: 12px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  padding: 12px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  z-index: 100;
}

.balance { font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 8px; }

.controls {
  margin: 12px auto;
  padding: 12px;
  max-width: 780px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.22);
  border-radius: 14px;
}

select, input, button {
  padding: 9px 12px;
  font-size: 16px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  margin: 4px;
}

button { cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; }

.start-btn {
  font-size: 22px;
  padding: 14px 36px;
  background: gold;
  color: #1b5e20;
}

.payout, .race-caller {
  color: #ffeb3b;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin-top: 8px;
}

.ticker-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #0b3d13;
  border-top: 2px solid gold;
  border-bottom: 2px solid gold;
  padding: 8px 0;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

.ticker {
  display: flex;
  width: max-content;
  animation: tickerMove 26s linear infinite;
}

.ticker span {
  white-space: nowrap;
  padding-right: 80px;
  font-weight: bold;
}

@keyframes tickerMove {
  from { transform: translateX(0); }
  to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

.track-area {
  width: min(95vw, 1200px);
  margin: 22px auto;
  background: #2e7d32;
  border: 10px solid #1b3d1f;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 18px;
  position: relative;
}

.race-lane {
  position: relative;
  height: 76px;
  background: #7a4f2a;
  border-bottom: 3px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.race-lane.selected { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 4px gold; }

.start-barrier {
  position: absolute;
  left: 8px;
  top: 8px;
  width: 74px;
  height: 60px;
  background: #263238;
  border: 2px solid white;
  border-radius: 6px;
  z-index: 4;
}

.barrier-number {
  position: absolute;
  top: 2px;
  left: 6px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: gold;
}

.red-light {
  position: absolute;
  top: -12px;
  left: 28px;
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  background: #5c0000;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid #111;
}

.red-light.flash { animation: flashRed 0.35s alternate infinite; }

@keyframes flashRed {
  from { background: #5c0000; }
  to { background: red; box-shadow: 0 0 16px red; }
}

.runner {
  position: absolute;
  left: 24px;
  top: 9px;
  width: 210px;
  text-align: center;
  z-index: 5;
  transition: left 3s ease-out;
}

.horse-name {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: bold;
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px black;
}

.horse-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 6px;
}

.silk {
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid white;
}

.horse {
  font-size: 34px;
  transform: scaleX(-1);
}

.finish-line {
  position: absolute;
  right: 70px;
  top: 0;
  width: 12px;
  height: 100%;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, white 0 10px, black 10px 20px);
  z-index: 8;
}

.modal {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.82);
  display: none;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  z-index: 1000;
}

.modal.show { display: flex; }

.race-modal-content {
  width: 96vw;
  height: 94vh;
  text-align: center;
}

.race-modal-content .track-area {
  width: 94vw;
  height: auto;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

.history-box {
  background: #1f5f24;
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  width: min(700px, 92vw);
  max-height: 85vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
  text-align: left;
}

.history-entry {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  padding: 10px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.photo-finish {
  font-size: 34px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: gold;
  animation: pulse 0.7s alternate infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
  from { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(1); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.08); }
}

.big-win {
  position: fixed;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  background: gold;
  color: #1b5e20;
  padding: 30px 45px;
  border-radius: 18px;
  font-size: 34px;
  font-weight: bold;
  z-index: 2000;
  animation: pop 1.4s ease-out forwards;
}

@keyframes pop {
  0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(.4); opacity: 0; }
  50% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2); opacity: 1; }
  100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); opacity: 0; }
}
</style>
</head>

<body>

<h1>🐎 Horse Race Slot Game</h1>

<div class="account-panel">
  <div class="balance">Balance: $<span id="balance">50.00</span></div>
  <button onclick="topUp()">Free $50 Top Up</button>
</div>

<div class="controls">
  <label>Pick a horse:</label>
  <select id="horseSelect"></select>

  <label>Bet Amount ($):</label>
  <input type="number" id="betAmount" min="1" step="1">

  <div class="payout" id="payout"></div>

  <button class="start-btn" onclick="startRace()">START RACE</button>
  <button onclick="openHistory()">Race History (Last 5)</button>
</div>

<div class="ticker-wrap">
  <div class="ticker" id="ticker"></div>
</div>

<div class="track-area" id="previewTrack"></div>

<div class="modal" id="historyModal">
  <div class="history-box">
    <h2>Race History</h2>
    <div id="historyContent"></div>
    <button onclick="closeHistory()">Close</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="modal" id="raceModal">
  <div class="race-modal-content">
    <h2 id="raceSummary">Live Race</h2>
    <div class="race-caller" id="raceCaller">Waiting for race...</div>
    <div class="track-area" id="raceTrack"></div>
    <button id="closeRaceBtn" onclick="closeRace()" style="display:none;">Close</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const namePool = [
  "Champagne Calling", "La Veuve", "Arabian Legacy", "Aspen Colorado",
  "Aurora Sunset", "Cadbury Castle", "Chequered Love", "Down The Barrel",
  "Extra Brut", "Merlin's Melody", "Mr No Nay", "My Lancelot",
  "My Matterhorn", "Naval Officer", "Nightsphere", "Ready By Design",
  "Sassy Rebel", "So Poysed", "Tango and Cash", "Tough Judge",
  "Trump This", "Uluru", "Dawn Rider", "Gaga's Girl", "Love Rustler"
];

const silkColours = ["red", "blue", "gold", "purple", "deeppink", "orange", "cyan", "lime"];

let horses = [];
let balance = Number(localStorage.getItem("balance")) || 50;
let lastTopUp = Number(localStorage.getItem("lastTopUp")) || null;
let history = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("history")) || [];
let raceInProgress = false;
let audioContext;

const balanceSpan = document.getElementById("balance");
const horseSelect = document.getElementById("horseSelect");
const betInput = document.getElementById("betAmount");
const payout = document.getElementById("payout");
const ticker = document.getElementById("ticker");
const previewTrack = document.getElementById("previewTrack");
const raceTrack = document.getElementById("raceTrack");
const raceCaller = document.getElementById("raceCaller");

function formatMoney(n) {
  return "$" + n.toFixed(2);
}

function saveBalance() {
  balanceSpan.textContent = balance.toFixed(2);
  localStorage.setItem("balance", balance);
}

function sound(freq, duration, type = "sine") {
  try {
    audioContext = audioContext || new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    const osc = audioContext.createOscillator();
    const gain = audioContext.createGain();
    osc.type = type;
    osc.frequency.value = freq;
    osc.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(audioContext.destination);
    gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.08, audioContext.currentTime);
    osc.start();
    osc.stop(audioContext.currentTime + duration);
  } catch {}
}

function randomOdds() {
  return Number((Math.random() * 12 + 1.5).toFixed(2));
}

function generateHorses() {
  const shuffled = [...namePool].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
  horses = shuffled.slice(0, 6).map((name, i) => ({
    name,
    odds: randomOdds(),
    barrier: i + 1,
    colour: silkColours[i % silkColours.length]
  }));
}

function weightedWinner() {
  const total = horses.reduce((s, h) => s + 1 / h.odds, 0);
  let r = Math.random() * total;

  for (let i = 0; i < horses.length; i++) {
    r -= 1 / horses[i].odds;
    if (r <= 0) return i;
  }
  return horses.length - 1;
}

function buildTrack(trackEl) {
  trackEl.innerHTML = "";

  const finish = document.createElement("div");
  finish.className = "finish-line";
  trackEl.appendChild(finish);

  const selected = Number(horseSelect.value);

  horses.forEach((horse, i) => {
    const lane = document.createElement("div");
    lane.className = "race-lane" + (selected === i ? " selected" : "");

    const barrier = document.createElement("div");
    barrier.className = "start-barrier";
    barrier.innerHTML = `
      <div class="red-light"></div>
      <div class="barrier-number">${horse.barrier}</div>
    `;

    const runner = document.createElement("div");
    runner.className = "runner";
    runner.id = "runner-" + i;
    runner.innerHTML = `
      <div class="horse-name">${horse.barrier}. ${horse.name}</div>
      <div class="horse-row">
        <div class="silk" style="background:${horse.colour}"></div>
        <div class="horse">🐎</div>
      </div>
    `;

    lane.appendChild(barrier);
    lane.appendChild(runner);
    trackEl.appendChild(lane);
  });
}

function setupRace() {
  generateHorses();

  horseSelect.innerHTML = "";
  horses.forEach((h, i) => {
    const opt = document.createElement("option");
    opt.value = i;
    opt.textContent = `Barrier ${h.barrier} - ${h.name} (${formatMoney(h.odds)})`;
    horseSelect.appendChild(opt);
  });

  const tickerText = horses
    .map(h => `🐎 Barrier ${h.barrier}: ${h.name} — ${formatMoney(h.odds)}`)
    .join(" &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; | &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; ");

  ticker.innerHTML = `<span>${tickerText}</span><span>${tickerText}</span>`;

  updatePayout();
  buildTrack(previewTrack);
}

function updatePayout() {
  const bet = Number(betInput.value);
  const selected = Number(horseSelect.value);

  payout.textContent = bet && horses[selected]
    ? "Potential payout: " + formatMoney(bet * horses[selected].odds)
    : "";

  buildTrack(previewTrack);
}

function flashLights(trackEl) {
  trackEl.querySelectorAll(".red-light").forEach(light => light.classList.add("flash"));
}

function stopLights(trackEl) {
  trackEl.querySelectorAll(".red-light").forEach(light => {
    light.classList.remove("flash");
    light.style.background = "green";
    light.style.boxShadow = "0 0 16px lime";
  });
}

function callRace(text) {
  raceCaller.textContent = text;
}

function startRace() {
  if (raceInProgress) return;

  const bet = Number(betInput.value);
  const selected = Number(horseSelect.value);

  if (!bet || bet <= 0) return alert("Enter a valid bet amount");
  if (bet > balance) return alert("Insufficient balance");

  balance -= bet;
  saveBalance();

  const winner = weightedWinner();
  const second = horses.map((_, i) => i).filter(i => i !== winner)[Math.floor(Math.random() * 5)];
  const photoFinish = Math.random() < 0.25;

  raceInProgress = true;

  document.getElementById("raceModal").classList.add("show");
  document.getElementById("closeRaceBtn").style.display = "none";
  document.getElementById("raceSummary").textContent =
    `Selected: Barrier ${horses[selected].barrier} - ${horses[selected].name} | Bet: ${formatMoney(bet)}`;

  buildTrack(raceTrack);

  callRace("Horses are loaded into the barriers...");
  sound(300, 0.15);

  setTimeout(() => {
    callRace("Red light flashing...");
    flashLights(raceTrack);
    sound(420, 0.15);
  }, 700);

  setTimeout(() => {
    callRace("They're off!");
    stopLights(raceTrack);
    sound(700, 0.22, "square");

    const trackWidth = raceTrack.clientWidth;
    const finishPosition = trackWidth - 115;

    horses.forEach((_, i) => {
      const runner = raceTrack.querySelector("#runner-" + i);
      runner.style.transition = "left 3s ease-out";

      if (i === winner) {
        runner.style.left = finishPosition + "px";
      } else if (photoFinish && i === second) {
        runner.style.left = (finishPosition - 18) + "px";
      } else {
        runner.style.left = (finishPosition - 150 - Math.random() * 200) + "px";
      }
    });

    setTimeout(() => {
      callRace(`${horses[winner].name} is driving hard at the line!`);
      sound(520, 0.12);
    }, 1400);

    setTimeout(() => {
      if (photoFinish) {
        callRace("📸 PHOTO FINISH!");
        raceCaller.classList.add("photo-finish");
        sound(900, 0.25, "sawtooth");

        setTimeout(() => {
          raceCaller.classList.remove("photo-finish");
          finishRace(selected, winner, bet);
        }, 1600);
      } else {
        finishRace(selected, winner, bet);
      }
    }, 3300);
  }, 2200);
}

function finishRace(selected, winner, bet) {
  let winnings = 0;

  if (selected === winner) {
    winnings = bet * horses[winner].odds;
    balance += winnings;
    saveBalance();

    sound(1000, 0.15);
    setTimeout(() => sound(1300, 0.2), 160);

    if (horses[winner].odds > 10) showBigWin(winnings);
  } else {
    sound(180, 0.25, "triangle");
  }

  history.unshift({
    winner: `Barrier ${horses[winner].barrier} - ${horses[winner].name}`,
    odds: formatMoney(horses[winner].odds),
    picked: `Barrier ${horses[selected].barrier} - ${horses[selected].name}`,
    winnings: winnings.toFixed(2)
  });

  history = history.slice(0, 5);
  localStorage.setItem("history", JSON.stringify(history));

  callRace(`🏆 ${horses[winner].name} wins!`);

  document.getElementById("raceSummary").textContent =
    `Winner: Barrier ${horses[winner].barrier} - ${horses[winner].name} (${formatMoney(horses[winner].odds)}) | Your pick: ${horses[selected].name} | Winnings: ${formatMoney(winnings)}`;

  document.getElementById("closeRaceBtn").style.display = "inline-block";
  raceInProgress = false;

  setupRace();
}

function showBigWin(amount) {
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.className = "big-win";
  div.textContent = `BIG WIN! ${formatMoney(amount)}`;
  document.body.appendChild(div);
  setTimeout(() => div.remove(), 1400);
}

function topUp() {
  const now = Date.now();

  if (lastTopUp && now - lastTopUp < 86400000) {
    alert("Only 1 free top is allowed within 24 hours. Please wait and try again later");
    return;
  }

  balance += 50;
  lastTopUp = now;
  localStorage.setItem("lastTopUp", lastTopUp);
  saveBalance();
}

function openHistory() {
  const content = document.getElementById("historyContent");

  content.innerHTML = history.length
    ? history.map(h => `
      <div class="history-entry">
        🏁 Winner: ${h.winner} (${h.odds})<br>
        🎯 Picked: ${h.picked}<br>
        💰 Winnings: $${h.winnings}
      </div>
    `).join("")
    : "<p>No races yet.</p>";

  document.getElementById("historyModal").classList.add("show");
}

function closeHistory() {
  document.getElementById("historyModal").classList.remove("show");
}

function closeRace() {
  if (!raceInProgress) {
    document.getElementById("raceModal").classList.remove("show");
  }
}

horseSelect.addEventListener("change", updatePayout);
betInput.addEventListener("input", updatePayout);

saveBalance();
setupRace();
</script>

</body>
</html>

That version includes the next-level stuff: photo finish, race caller, coloured silks, and sounds.


You said:

i love this - can we add sound files so we can have commentary? Or is that too hard?

ChatGPT said:

Not too hard at all mate — very doable.

Best way:

  1. Create a folder in GitHub called:

sounds

  1. Add audio files like:

sounds/loaded.mp3
sounds/red-light.mp3
sounds/theyre-off.mp3
sounds/photo-finish.mp3
sounds/winner.mp3

  1. In the code, replace the browser beeps with:

JavaScript
const sounds = {
  loaded: new Audio("sounds/loaded.mp3"),
  redLight: new Audio("sounds/red-light.mp3"),
  off: new Audio("sounds/theyre-off.mp3"),
  photo: new Audio("sounds/photo-finish.mp3"),
  winner: new Audio("sounds/winner.mp3")
};

function playSound(name) {
  sounds[name].currentTime = 0;
  sounds[name].play().catch(() => {});
}

Then call:

JavaScript
playSound("loaded");
playSound("redLight");
playSound("off");
playSound("photo");
playSound("winner");

So no — not hard. The only tricky bit is sourcing or recording the commentary files.

You could:

  • record your own voice on your phone

  • use free sound effects

  • generate short voice clips elsewhere

  • use race crowd / bell / hoofbeat sounds

For GitHub Pages, as long as the files are in the repo and paths match exactly, it’ll work.


You said:

oh ok... I might leave that for now... :)

ChatGPT said:

🤣 Good call mate.

I'd actually leave the voice commentary for now too.

At the moment you've got:

  • 🏇 Random horses

  • 💰 Betting

  • 📈 Odds

  • 🎯 Horse selection

  • 💵 Persistent bankroll

  • 🎁 Daily top-up

  • 📜 Race history

  • 🚦 Barrier loading

  • 🔴 Flashing red light

  • 🏁 Finish line

  • 📸 Photo finish

  • 🎨 Coloured silks

  • 🎙️ Race caller text

  • 🔊 Sound effects

  • 🏆 Big win celebrations

  • 🐎 Your own horses as the runners

That's already a pretty impressive little game.

If I were prioritising the next improvements, I'd actually put voice commentary well down the list and instead focus on things that make the racing itself feel more alive:

1. Horses change positions during the race

At the moment the winner is effectively decided at the start and everyone runs to their finishing position.

A much cooler effect would be:

  • Horses overtake each other

  • Leaders change during the race

  • The commentary reflects it

Example:

They're off!

Uluru leads early...

Down The Barrel moves into second...

Champagne Calling is charging home...

PHOTO FINISH!

This would make every race feel unique.

2. Race statistics

A small "My Stats" popup:

  • Total races

  • Total wins

  • Win %

  • Biggest payout

  • Highest bankroll

  • Favourite horse

People love stats.

3. Lucky Horse feature

Each day one horse gets:

⭐ Lucky Horse

and maybe slightly better odds or a little icon.

4. Progressive Jackpot

Every losing bet contributes:

Jackpot: $127.35

Hit a horse at odds above $10 and win the jackpot.

That becomes surprisingly addictive 😄

5. Horse form guide

In the dropdown:

1. Champagne Calling ⭐⭐
2. Uluru ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
3. Tango and Cash ⭐⭐⭐

Purely cosmetic, but it makes it feel like a real race meeting.

For now though mate, I'd enjoy it for a few days and see what jumps out at you. The best ideas usually come after you've actually played the game a bit.

And I have to say, using the names of horses you've owned was a brilliant touch. Every race now has a story behind it rather than being six random names. 🏇🍻


You said:

can we make the race a little longer though - it seems to be over very quickly....

ChatGPT said:

Absolutely mate 👍

This is actually one of the easiest improvements you can make, and it'll have a huge impact on how the game feels.

At the moment the race is roughly:

  • 2.2 seconds pre-race sequence

  • 3 seconds racing

  • Total ≈ 5 seconds

That's why it feels a bit like:

"They're off... and it's over."

Option 1 (my favourite)

Keep the barriers and flashing lights exactly as they are, but make the race itself 8–10 seconds.

Find this:

JavaScript
runner.style.transition = "left 3s ease-out";

Change to:

JavaScript
runner.style.transition = "left 8s ease-out";

Then find:

JavaScript
setTimeout(() => {
  finishRace(selected, winner, bet);
}, 3200);

Change to:

JavaScript
setTimeout(() => {
  finishRace(selected, winner, bet);
}, 8200);

This alone makes a massive difference.

Option 2 (even better)

Add a short race countdown:

Horses are loaded...
🔴 Red Light
🔴 Red Light
🔴 Red Light

3...
2...
1...

THEY'RE OFF!

This builds anticipation.

Option 3 (best overall)

Make the horses run in stages.

Instead of:

Barrier → Finish

Do:

Barrier → 30%
30% → 60%
60% → 80%
80% → Finish

At each stage:

Champagne Calling leads!

Uluru takes over!

Down The Barrel is flying!

Now the race lasts 10–12 seconds and feels alive.

What I'd use

Personally I'd go with:

  • 2 second barrier sequence

  • 3 second countdown

  • 8 second race

  • Random race commentary during the run

Total race length:

~13 seconds

That's about the sweet spot. Long enough to feel exciting, short enough that people will run race after race.

One small thing I'd also do: make the horses start much closer to the barriers and finish right on the finish line, so the whole track gets used. At the moment they're covering only part of the available distance, which makes the race feel shorter than it really is.

That single change plus an 8-second run will make it feel like a proper race meeting rather than a quick animation. 🏇🏁🍻


You said:

yes - lets do it mate

ChatGPT said:

Perfect — I’ll stretch the race without changing the rest of the game. I’m going with a longer build-up, a short countdown, and an 8-second race so it feels more like a proper event.

Yes mate — make these 3 changes in your current code.

1. Find this section:

JavaScript
setTimeout(() => {
  callRace("They're off!");

Replace it with:

JavaScript
setTimeout(() => {
  callRace("3...");
  sound(400, 0.12);

  setTimeout(() => {
    callRace("2...");
    sound(400, 0.12);
  }, 900);

  setTimeout(() => {
    callRace("1...");
    sound(400, 0.12);
  }, 1800);

  setTimeout(() => {
    callRace("They're off!");
    sound(700, 0.22, "square");

2. In that same block, find:

JavaScript
runner.style.transition = "left 3s ease-out";

Change it to:

JavaScript
runner.style.transition = "left 8s ease-out";

3. Find:

JavaScript
}, 3300);

Change it to:

JavaScript
}, 8300);

4. At the end of that race-start block, add one extra closing timer:

Because we added nested countdown timing, change the very end of that setTimeout block from:

JavaScript
  }, 2200);
}

to:

JavaScript
  }, 2700);
}, 2200);
}

This gives you:

  • flashing red light

  • 3, 2, 1 countdown

  • longer 8-second race

  • photo finish still works

  • all betting/history/balance logic stays the same


You said:

Can I please have the full updated code mate... it's easier for me :)

ChatGPT said:

Absolutely mate — full updated code is the safest way 👍
Replace your entire index.html with this version:

HTML
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Horse Race Slot Game</title>

<style>
* { box-sizing: border-box; }

body {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
  background: #1b5e20;
  color: white;
  text-align: center;
}

h1 { margin: 14px 0 6px; }

.account-panel {
  position: fixed;
  top: 12px;
  right: 12px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  padding: 12px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  z-index: 100;
}

.balance { font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 8px; }

.controls {
  margin: 12px auto;
  padding: 12px;
  max-width: 780px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.22);
  border-radius: 14px;
}

select, input, button {
  padding: 9px 12px;
  font-size: 16px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  margin: 4px;
}

button { cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; }

.start-btn {
  font-size: 22px;
  padding: 14px 36px;
  background: gold;
  color: #1b5e20;
}

.payout, .race-caller {
  color: #ffeb3b;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin-top: 8px;
}

.ticker-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #0b3d13;
  border-top: 2px solid gold;
  border-bottom: 2px solid gold;
  padding: 8px 0;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

.ticker {
  display: flex;
  width: max-content;
  animation: tickerMove 26s linear infinite;
}

.ticker span {
  white-space: nowrap;
  padding-right: 80px;
  font-weight: bold;
}

@keyframes tickerMove {
  from { transform: translateX(0); }
  to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

.track-area {
  width: min(95vw, 1200px);
  margin: 22px auto;
  background: #2e7d32;
  border: 10px solid #1b3d1f;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 18px;
  position: relative;
}

.race-lane {
  position: relative;
  height: 76px;
  background: #7a4f2a;
  border-bottom: 3px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.race-lane.selected { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 4px gold; }

.start-barrier {
  position: absolute;
  left: 8px;
  top: 8px;
  width: 74px;
  height: 60px;
  background: #263238;
  border: 2px solid white;
  border-radius: 6px;
  z-index: 4;
}

.barrier-number {
  position: absolute;
  top: 2px;
  left: 6px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: gold;
}

.red-light {
  position: absolute;
  top: -12px;
  left: 28px;
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  background: #5c0000;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid #111;
}

.red-light.flash { animation: flashRed 0.35s alternate infinite; }

@keyframes flashRed {
  from { background: #5c0000; }
  to { background: red; box-shadow: 0 0 16px red; }
}

.runner {
  position: absolute;
  left: 24px;
  top: 9px;
  width: 210px;
  text-align: center;
  z-index: 5;
  transition: left 8s ease-out;
}

.horse-name {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: bold;
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px black;
}

.horse-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 6px;
}

.silk {
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid white;
}

.horse {
  font-size: 34px;
  transform: scaleX(-1);
}

.finish-line {
  position: absolute;
  right: 70px;
  top: 0;
  width: 12px;
  height: 100%;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, white 0 10px, black 10px 20px);
  z-index: 8;
}

.modal {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.82);
  display: none;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  z-index: 1000;
}

.modal.show { display: flex; }

.race-modal-content {
  width: 96vw;
  height: 94vh;
  text-align: center;
}

.race-modal-content .track-area {
  width: 94vw;
  height: auto;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

.history-box {
  background: #1f5f24;
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  width: min(700px, 92vw);
  max-height: 85vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
  text-align: left;
}

.history-entry {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  padding: 10px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.photo-finish {
  font-size: 34px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: gold;
  animation: pulse 0.7s alternate infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
  from { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(1); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.08); }
}

.big-win {
  position: fixed;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  background: gold;
  color: #1b5e20;
  padding: 30px 45px;
  border-radius: 18px;
  font-size: 34px;
  font-weight: bold;
  z-index: 2000;
  animation: pop 1.4s ease-out forwards;
}

@keyframes pop {
  0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(.4); opacity: 0; }
  50% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2); opacity: 1; }
  100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); opacity: 0; }
}
</style>
</head>

<body>

<h1>🐎 Horse Race Slot Game</h1>

<div class="account-panel">
  <div class="balance">Balance: $<span id="balance">50.00</span></div>
  <button onclick="topUp()">Free $50 Top Up</button>
</div>

<div class="controls">
  <label>Pick a horse:</label>
  <select id="horseSelect"></select>

  <label>Bet Amount ($):</label>
  <input type="number" id="betAmount" min="1" step="1">

  <div class="payout" id="payout"></div>

  <button class="start-btn" onclick="startRace()">START RACE</button>
  <button onclick="openHistory()">Race History (Last 5)</button>
</div>

<div class="ticker-wrap">
  <div class="ticker" id="ticker"></div>
</div>

<div class="track-area" id="previewTrack"></div>

<div class="modal" id="historyModal">
  <div class="history-box">
    <h2>Race History</h2>
    <div id="historyContent"></div>
    <button onclick="closeHistory()">Close</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="modal" id="raceModal">
  <div class="race-modal-content">
    <h2 id="raceSummary">Live Race</h2>
    <div class="race-caller" id="raceCaller">Waiting for race...</div>
    <div class="track-area" id="raceTrack"></div>
    <button id="closeRaceBtn" onclick="closeRace()" style="display:none;">Close</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const namePool = [
  "Champagne Calling", "La Veuve", "Arabian Legacy", "Aspen Colorado",
  "Aurora Sunset", "Cadbury Castle", "Chequered Love", "Down The Barrel",
  "Extra Brut", "Merlin's Melody", "Mr No Nay", "My Lancelot",
  "My Matterhorn", "Naval Officer", "Nightsphere", "Ready By Design",
  "Sassy Rebel", "So Poysed", "Tango and Cash", "Tough Judge",
  "Trump This", "Uluru", "Dawn Rider", "Gaga's Girl", "Love Rustler"
];

const silkColours = ["red", "blue", "gold", "purple", "deeppink", "orange", "cyan", "lime"];

let horses = [];
let balance = Number(localStorage.getItem("balance")) || 50;
let lastTopUp = Number(localStorage.getItem("lastTopUp")) || null;
let history = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("history")) || [];
let raceInProgress = false;
let audioContext;

const balanceSpan = document.getElementById("balance");
const horseSelect = document.getElementById("horseSelect");
const betInput = document.getElementById("betAmount");
const payout = document.getElementById("payout");
const ticker = document.getElementById("ticker");
const previewTrack = document.getElementById("previewTrack");
const raceTrack = document.getElementById("raceTrack");
const raceCaller = document.getElementById("raceCaller");

function formatMoney(n) {
  return "$" + n.toFixed(2);
}

function saveBalance() {
  balanceSpan.textContent = balance.toFixed(2);
  localStorage.setItem("balance", balance);
}

function sound(freq, duration, type = "sine") {
  try {
    audioContext = audioContext || new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    const osc = audioContext.createOscillator();
    const gain = audioContext.createGain();

    osc.type = type;
    osc.frequency.value = freq;
    osc.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(audioContext.destination);

    gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.08, audioContext.currentTime);

    osc.start();
    osc.stop(audioContext.currentTime + duration);
  } catch {}
}

function randomOdds() {
  return Number((Math.random() * 12 + 1.5).toFixed(2));
}

function generateHorses() {
  const shuffled = [...namePool].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
  horses = shuffled.slice(0, 6).map((name, i) => ({
    name,
    odds: randomOdds(),
    barrier: i + 1,
    colour: silkColours[i % silkColours.length]
  }));
}

function weightedWinner() {
  const total = horses.reduce((s, h) => s + 1 / h.odds, 0);
  let r = Math.random() * total;

  for (let i = 0; i < horses.length; i++) {
    r -= 1 / horses[i].odds;
    if (r <= 0) return i;
  }

  return horses.length - 1;
}

function buildTrack(trackEl) {
  trackEl.innerHTML = "";

  const finish = document.createElement("div");
  finish.className = "finish-line";
  trackEl.appendChild(finish);

  const selected = Number(horseSelect.value);

  horses.forEach((horse, i) => {
    const lane = document.createElement("div");
    lane.className = "race-lane" + (selected === i ? " selected" : "");

    const barrier = document.createElement("div");
    barrier.className = "start-barrier";
    barrier.innerHTML = `
      <div class="red-light"></div>
      <div class="barrier-number">${horse.barrier}</div>
    `;

    const runner = document.createElement("div");
    runner.className = "runner";
    runner.id = "runner-" + i;
    runner.innerHTML = `
      <div class="horse-name">${horse.barrier}. ${horse.name}</div>
      <div class="horse-row">
        <div class="silk" style="background:${horse.colour}"></div>
        <div class="horse">🐎</div>
      </div>
    `;

    lane.appendChild(barrier);
    lane.appendChild(runner);
    trackEl.appendChild(lane);
  });
}

function setupRace() {
  generateHorses();

  horseSelect.innerHTML = "";
  horses.forEach((h, i) => {
    const opt = document.createElement("option");
    opt.value = i;
    opt.textContent = `Barrier ${h.barrier} - ${h.name} (${formatMoney(h.odds)})`;
    horseSelect.appendChild(opt);
  });

  const tickerText = horses
    .map(h => `🐎 Barrier ${h.barrier}: ${h.name} — ${formatMoney(h.odds)}`)
    .join(" &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; | &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; ");

  ticker.innerHTML = `<span>${tickerText}</span><span>${tickerText}</span>`;

  updatePayout();
  buildTrack(previewTrack);
}

function updatePayout() {
  const bet = Number(betInput.value);
  const selected = Number(horseSelect.value);

  payout.textContent = bet && horses[selected]
    ? "Potential payout: " + formatMoney(bet * horses[selected].odds)
    : "";

  buildTrack(previewTrack);
}

function flashLights(trackEl) {
  trackEl.querySelectorAll(".red-light").forEach(light => light.classList.add("flash"));
}

function stopLights(trackEl) {
  trackEl.querySelectorAll(".red-light").forEach(light => {
    light.classList.remove("flash");
    light.style.background = "green";
    light.style.boxShadow = "0 0 16px lime";
  });
}

function callRace(text) {
  raceCaller.textContent = text;
}

function startRace() {
  if (raceInProgress) return;

  const bet = Number(betInput.value);
  const selected = Number(horseSelect.value);

  if (!bet || bet <= 0) return alert("Enter a valid bet amount");
  if (bet > balance) return alert("Insufficient balance");

  balance -= bet;
  saveBalance();

  const winner = weightedWinner();
  const second = horses
    .map((_, i) => i)
    .filter(i => i !== winner)[Math.floor(Math.random() * 5)];

  const photoFinish = Math.random() < 0.25;

  raceInProgress = true;

  document.getElementById("raceModal").classList.add("show");
  document.getElementById("closeRaceBtn").style.display = "none";
  document.getElementById("raceSummary").textContent =
    `Selected: Barrier ${horses[selected].barrier} - ${horses[selected].name} | Bet: ${formatMoney(bet)}`;

  buildTrack(raceTrack);

  callRace("Horses are loaded into the barriers...");
  sound(300, 0.15);

  setTimeout(() => {
    callRace("Red light flashing...");
    flashLights(raceTrack);
    sound(420, 0.15);
  }, 700);

  setTimeout(() => {
    callRace("3...");
    sound(400, 0.12);

    setTimeout(() => {
      callRace("2...");
      sound(400, 0.12);
    }, 900);

    setTimeout(() => {
      callRace("1...");
      sound(400, 0.12);
    }, 1800);

    setTimeout(() => {
      callRace("They're off!");
      stopLights(raceTrack);
      sound(700, 0.22, "square");

      const trackWidth = raceTrack.clientWidth;
      const finishPosition = trackWidth - 115;

      horses.forEach((_, i) => {
        const runner = raceTrack.querySelector("#runner-" + i);
        runner.style.transition = "left 8s ease-out";

        if (i === winner) {
          runner.style.left = finishPosition + "px";
        } else if (photoFinish && i === second) {
          runner.style.left = (finishPosition - 18) + "px";
        } else {
          runner.style.left = (finishPosition - 150 - Math.random() * 200) + "px";
        }
      });

      setTimeout(() => {
        callRace(`${horses[winner].name} is driving hard at the line!`);
        sound(520, 0.12);
      }, 4200);

      setTimeout(() => {
        if (photoFinish) {
          callRace("📸 PHOTO FINISH!");
          raceCaller.classList.add("photo-finish");
          sound(900, 0.25, "sawtooth");

          setTimeout(() => {
            raceCaller.classList.remove("photo-finish");
            finishRace(selected, winner, bet);
          }, 1600);
        } else {
          finishRace(selected, winner, bet);
        }
      }, 8300);

    }, 2700);
  }, 2200);
}

function finishRace(selected, winner, bet) {
  let winnings = 0;

  if (selected === winner) {
    winnings = bet * horses[winner].odds;
    balance += winnings;
    saveBalance();

    sound(1000, 0.15);
    setTimeout(() => sound(1300, 0.2), 160);

    if (horses[winner].odds > 10) {
      showBigWin(winnings);
    }
  } else {
    sound(180, 0.25, "triangle");
  }

  history.unshift({
    winner: `Barrier ${horses[winner].barrier} - ${horses[winner].name}`,
    odds: formatMoney(horses[winner].odds),
    picked: `Barrier ${horses[selected].barrier} - ${horses[selected].name}`,
    winnings: winnings.toFixed(2)
  });

  history = history.slice(0, 5);
  localStorage.setItem("history", JSON.stringify(history));

  callRace(`🏆 ${horses[winner].name} wins!`);

  document.getElementById("raceSummary").textContent =
    `Winner: Barrier ${horses[winner].barrier} - ${horses[winner].name} (${formatMoney(horses[winner].odds)}) | Your pick: ${horses[selected].name} | Winnings: ${formatMoney(winnings)}`;

  document.getElementById("closeRaceBtn").style.display = "inline-block";
  raceInProgress = false;

  setupRace();
}

function showBigWin(amount) {
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.className = "big-win";
  div.textContent = `BIG WIN! ${formatMoney(amount)}`;
  document.body.appendChild(div);
  setTimeout(() => div.remove(), 1400);
}

function topUp() {
  const now = Date.now();

  if (lastTopUp && now - lastTopUp < 86400000) {
    alert("Only 1 free top is allowed within 24 hours. Please wait and try again later");
    return;
  }

  balance += 50;
  lastTopUp = now;
  localStorage.setItem("lastTopUp", lastTopUp);
  saveBalance();
}

function openHistory() {
  const content = document.getElementById("historyContent");

  content.innerHTML = history.length
    ? history.map(h => `
      <div class="history-entry">
        🏁 Winner: ${h.winner} (${h.odds})<br>
        🎯 Picked: ${h.picked}<br>
        💰 Winnings: $${h.winnings}
      </div>
    `).join("")
    : "<p>No races yet.</p>";

  document.getElementById("historyModal").classList.add("show");
}

function closeHistory() {
  document.getElementById("historyModal").classList.remove("show");
}

function closeRace() {
  if (!raceInProgress) {
    document.getElementById("raceModal").classList.remove("show");
  }
}

horseSelect.addEventListener("change", updatePayout);
betInput.addEventListener("input", updatePayout);

saveBalance();
setupRace();
</script>

</body>
</html>

This version adds the 3, 2, 1 countdown and makes the actual race run for about 8 seconds.


You said:

and the commentary?? does that also reflect horses changing positions?

ChatGPT said:

Not yet mate — and that's actually the biggest limitation of the current version.

At the moment the commentary is essentially scripted:

Horses are loaded into the barriers...
Red light flashing...
3...
2...
1...
They're off!

Champagne Calling is driving hard at the line!

PHOTO FINISH!

Champagne Calling wins!

The commentary is using the winner's name, but it isn't actually tracking what the horses are doing during the race.

What we have now

The race outcome is determined at the start:

JavaScript
const winner = weightedWinner();

Then all horses are simply animated to their finishing positions.

So if the commentary says:

Uluru takes the lead!

there is no guarantee Uluru was actually leading at that point.

What I would do instead

I'd move to a live race engine.

Instead of:

Horse A -> Finish
Horse B -> Finish
Horse C -> Finish

we would continuously update positions:

JavaScript
horse.position += randomSpeed;

perhaps 30 times per second.

Then every second we can determine:

JavaScript
leader = horse currently furthest ahead
second = horse currently second
last = horse currently last

and the race caller can announce real events:

They're off!

Uluru jumps brilliantly!

Champagne Calling moves into second!

Down The Barrel takes the lead!

Tango and Cash is making a run down the outside!

PHOTO FINISH!

Uluru wins!

Now the commentary is describing the race that's actually happening.

Even better...

We can make horses have personalities.

Example:

JavaScript
{
  name: "Uluru",
  earlySpeed: 9,
  stamina: 6,
  finishKick: 10
}

Another horse:

JavaScript
{
  name: "Champagne Calling",
  earlySpeed: 4,
  stamina: 10,
  finishKick: 8
}

So:

  • Uluru jumps quickly

  • Champagne Calling finishes strongly

  • Down The Barrel sits midfield then charges late

The races start feeling genuinely different.

What I'd recommend

Rather than keep adding onto the current animation, I'd do a Version 2 race engine.

Keep:

  • betting

  • bankroll

  • history

  • top-up

  • ticker

  • barriers

  • horse colours

  • sounds

Replace only:

The actual race animation

with:

Live horse positions
Overtakes
Real commentary
Photo finishes
Dynamic leaders

That would take it from:

"Fun betting game"

to

"I actually want to watch the race."

And honestly mate, I think that's the point where people start clicking START RACE again and again just to see what happens. 🏇🏆😄


You said:

OK lets do that mate - can I please have the code?

ChatGPT said:

Yep — this is the proper “Version 2 race engine”. I’m keeping the app structure intact, but replacing the race animation with live positions, overtakes, dynamic commentary, and winner/photo-finish logic based on the actual race simulation.

Absolutely mate — here is the full Version 2 code with live race engine + real changing commentary.

Replace your whole index.html with this:

HTML
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Horse Race Slot Game</title>

<style>
* { box-sizing: border-box; }

body {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
  background: #1b5e20;
  color: white;
  text-align: center;
}

h1 { margin: 14px 0 6px; }

.account-panel {
  position: fixed;
  top: 12px;
  right: 12px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  padding: 12px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  z-index: 100;
}

.balance { font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 8px; }

.controls {
  margin: 12px auto;
  padding: 12px;
  max-width: 780px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.22);
  border-radius: 14px;
}

select, input, button {
  padding: 9px 12px;
  font-size: 16px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  margin: 4px;
}

button { cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; }

.start-btn {
  font-size: 22px;
  padding: 14px 36px;
  background: gold;
  color: #1b5e20;
}

.payout, .race-caller {
  color: #ffeb3b;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin-top: 8px;
}

.ticker-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #0b3d13;
  border-top: 2px solid gold;
  border-bottom: 2px solid gold;
  padding: 8px 0;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

.ticker {
  display: flex;
  width: max-content;
  animation: tickerMove 26s linear infinite;
}

.ticker span {
  white-space: nowrap;
  padding-right: 80px;
  font-weight: bold;
}

@keyframes tickerMove {
  from { transform: translateX(0); }
  to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

.track-area {
  width: min(95vw, 1200px);
  margin: 22px auto;
  background: #2e7d32;
  border: 10px solid #1b3d1f;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 18px;
  position: relative;
}

.race-lane {
  position: relative;
  height: 76px;
  background: #7a4f2a;
  border-bottom: 3px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.race-lane.selected { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 4px gold; }

.start-barrier {
  position: absolute;
  left: 8px;
  top: 8px;
  width: 74px;
  height: 60px;
  background: #263238;
  border: 2px solid white;
  border-radius: 6px;
  z-index: 4;
}

.barrier-number {
  position: absolute;
  top: 2px;
  left: 6px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: gold;
}

.red-light {
  position: absolute;
  top: -12px;
  left: 28px;
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  background: #5c0000;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid #111;
}

.red-light.flash { animation: flashRed 0.35s alternate infinite; }

@keyframes flashRed {
  from { background: #5c0000; }
  to { background: red; box-shadow: 0 0 16px red; }
}

.runner {
  position: absolute;
  left: 24px;
  top: 9px;
  width: 210px;
  text-align: center;
  z-index: 5;
}

.horse-name {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: bold;
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px black;
}

.horse-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 6px;
}

.silk {
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid white;
}

.horse {
  font-size: 34px;
  transform: scaleX(-1);
}

.finish-line {
  position: absolute;
  right: 70px;
  top: 0;
  width: 12px;
  height: 100%;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, white 0 10px, black 10px 20px);
  z-index: 8;
}

.modal {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.82);
  display: none;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  z-index: 1000;
}

.modal.show { display: flex; }

.race-modal-content {
  width: 96vw;
  height: 94vh;
  text-align: center;
}

.race-modal-content .track-area {
  width: 94vw;
  height: auto;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

.history-box {
  background: #1f5f24;
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  width: min(700px, 92vw);
  max-height: 85vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
  text-align: left;
}

.history-entry {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  padding: 10px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.photo-finish {
  font-size: 34px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: gold;
  animation: pulse 0.7s alternate infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
  from { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(1); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.08); }
}

.big-win {
  position: fixed;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  background: gold;
  color: #1b5e20;
  padding: 30px 45px;
  border-radius: 18px;
  font-size: 34px;
  font-weight: bold;
  z-index: 2000;
  animation: pop 1.4s ease-out forwards;
}

@keyframes pop {
  0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(.4); opacity: 0; }
  50% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2); opacity: 1; }
  100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); opacity: 0; }
}
</style>
</head>

<body>

<h1>🐎 Horse Race Slot Game</h1>

<div class="account-panel">
  <div class="balance">Balance: $<span id="balance">50.00</span></div>
  <button onclick="topUp()">Free $50 Top Up</button>
</div>

<div class="controls">
  <label>Pick a horse:</label>
  <select id="horseSelect"></select>

  <label>Bet Amount ($):</label>
  <input type="number" id="betAmount" min="1" step="1">

  <div class="payout" id="payout"></div>

  <button class="start-btn" onclick="startRace()">START RACE</button>
  <button onclick="openHistory()">Race History (Last 5)</button>
</div>

<div class="ticker-wrap">
  <div class="ticker" id="ticker"></div>
</div>

<div class="track-area" id="previewTrack"></div>

<div class="modal" id="historyModal">
  <div class="history-box">
    <h2>Race History</h2>
    <div id="historyContent"></div>
    <button onclick="closeHistory()">Close</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="modal" id="raceModal">
  <div class="race-modal-content">
    <h2 id="raceSummary">Live Race</h2>
    <div class="race-caller" id="raceCaller">Waiting for race...</div>
    <div class="track-area" id="raceTrack"></div>
    <button id="closeRaceBtn" onclick="closeRace()" style="display:none;">Close</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const namePool = [
  "Champagne Calling", "La Veuve", "Arabian Legacy", "Aspen Colorado",
  "Aurora Sunset", "Cadbury Castle", "Chequered Love", "Down The Barrel",
  "Extra Brut", "Merlin's Melody", "Mr No Nay", "My Lancelot",
  "My Matterhorn", "Naval Officer", "Nightsphere", "Ready By Design",
  "Sassy Rebel", "So Poysed", "Tango and Cash", "Tough Judge",
  "Trump This", "Uluru", "Dawn Rider", "Gaga's Girl", "Love Rustler"
];

const silkColours = ["red", "blue", "gold", "purple", "deeppink", "orange", "cyan", "lime"];

let horses = [];
let balance = Number(localStorage.getItem("balance")) || 50;
let lastTopUp = Number(localStorage.getItem("lastTopUp")) || null;
let history = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("history")) || [];
let raceInProgress = false;
let audioContext;

const balanceSpan = document.getElementById("balance");
const horseSelect = document.getElementById("horseSelect");
const betInput = document.getElementById("betAmount");
const payout = document.getElementById("payout");
const ticker = document.getElementById("ticker");
const previewTrack = document.getElementById("previewTrack");
const raceTrack = document.getElementById("raceTrack");
const raceCaller = document.getElementById("raceCaller");

function formatMoney(n) {
  return "$" + n.toFixed(2);
}

function saveBalance() {
  balanceSpan.textContent = balance.toFixed(2);
  localStorage.setItem("balance", balance);
}

function sound(freq, duration, type = "sine") {
  try {
    audioContext = audioContext || new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    const osc = audioContext.createOscillator();
    const gain = audioContext.createGain();

    osc.type = type;
    osc.frequency.value = freq;
    osc.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(audioContext.destination);

    gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.08, audioContext.currentTime);

    osc.start();
    osc.stop(audioContext.currentTime + duration);
  } catch {}
}

function randomOdds() {
  return Number((Math.random() * 12 + 1.5).toFixed(2));
}

function generateHorses() {
  const shuffled = [...namePool].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);

  horses = shuffled.slice(0, 6).map((name, i) => ({
    name,
    odds: randomOdds(),
    barrier: i + 1,
    colour: silkColours[i % silkColours.length],
    position: 0,
    speed: 0,
    energy: 1,
    finishingKick: 1
  }));
}

function weightedFavouriteBoost() {
  const total = horses.reduce((s, h) => s + 1 / h.odds, 0);
  let r = Math.random() * total;

  for (let i = 0; i < horses.length; i++) {
    r -= 1 / horses[i].odds;
    if (r <= 0) return i;
  }

  return horses.length - 1;
}

function buildTrack(trackEl) {
  trackEl.innerHTML = "";

  const finish = document.createElement("div");
  finish.className = "finish-line";
  trackEl.appendChild(finish);

  const selected = Number(horseSelect.value);

  horses.forEach((horse, i) => {
    const lane = document.createElement("div");
    lane.className = "race-lane" + (selected === i ? " selected" : "");

    const barrier = document.createElement("div");
    barrier.className = "start-barrier";
    barrier.innerHTML = `
      <div class="red-light"></div>
      <div class="barrier-number">${horse.barrier}</div>
    `;

    const runner = document.createElement("div");
    runner.className = "runner";
    runner.id = "runner-" + i;
    runner.innerHTML = `
      <div class="horse-name">${horse.barrier}. ${horse.name}</div>
      <div class="horse-row">
        <div class="silk" style="background:${horse.colour}"></div>
        <div class="horse">🐎</div>
      </div>
    `;

    lane.appendChild(barrier);
    lane.appendChild(runner);
    trackEl.appendChild(lane);
  });
}

function setupRace() {
  generateHorses();

  horseSelect.innerHTML = "";
  horses.forEach((h, i) => {
    const opt = document.createElement("option");
    opt.value = i;
    opt.textContent = `Barrier ${h.barrier} - ${h.name} (${formatMoney(h.odds)})`;
    horseSelect.appendChild(opt);
  });

  const tickerText = horses
    .map(h => `🐎 Barrier ${h.barrier}: ${h.name} — ${formatMoney(h.odds)}`)
    .join(" &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; | &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; ");

  ticker.innerHTML = `<span>${tickerText}</span><span>${tickerText}</span>`;

  updatePayout();
  buildTrack(previewTrack);
}

function updatePayout() {
  const bet = Number(betInput.value);
  const selected = Number(horseSelect.value);

  payout.textContent = bet && horses[selected]
    ? "Potential payout: " + formatMoney(bet * horses[selected].odds)
    : "";

  buildTrack(previewTrack);
}

function flashLights(trackEl) {
  trackEl.querySelectorAll(".red-light").forEach(light => light.classList.add("flash"));
}

function stopLights(trackEl) {
  trackEl.querySelectorAll(".red-light").forEach(light => {
    light.classList.remove("flash");
    light.style.background = "green";
    light.style.boxShadow = "0 0 16px lime";
  });
}

function callRace(text) {
  raceCaller.textContent = text;
}

function getFinishPosition() {
  return raceTrack.clientWidth - 115;
}

function updateHorseVisuals() {
  const finishPosition = getFinishPosition();
  const startPosition = 24;
  const distance = finishPosition - startPosition;

  horses.forEach((horse, i) => {
    const runner = raceTrack.querySelector("#runner-" + i);
    if (!runner) return;

    const left = startPosition + distance * (horse.position / 100);
    runner.style.left = left + "px";
  });
}

function getLeaderOrder() {
  return [...horses]
    .map((h, i) => ({ ...h, index: i }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.position - a.position);
}

function resetRaceStats(boostedIndex) {
  horses.forEach((horse, i) => {
    horse.position = 0;

    const oddsFactor = Math.max(0.82, 1.25 - horse.odds / 18);
    const randomFactor = 0.85 + Math.random() * 0.35;
    const boost = i === boostedIndex ? 1.12 : 1;

    horse.speed = oddsFactor * randomFactor * boost;
    horse.energy = 0.95 + Math.random() * 0.25;
    horse.finishingKick = 0.9 + Math.random() * 0.35;
  });
}

function liveRaceCommentary(elapsed, lastLeaderIndex) {
  const order = getLeaderOrder();
  const leader = order[0];
  const second = order[1];

  if (leader.index !== lastLeaderIndex) {
    callRace(`${leader.name} takes the lead from ${second.name}!`);
    sound(520, 0.1);
    return leader.index;
  }

  const lines = [
    `${leader.name} leads, but ${second.name} is right there!`,
    `${second.name} is starting to make a move!`,
    `${leader.name} is travelling strongly!`,
    `${order[2].name} is trying to close the gap!`,
    `${order[5].name} needs to find something late!`
  ];

  callRace(lines[Math.floor(Math.random() * lines.length)]);
  return lastLeaderIndex;
}

function startRace() {
  if (raceInProgress) return;

  const bet = Number(betInput.value);
  const selected = Number(horseSelect.value);

  if (!bet || bet <= 0) return alert("Enter a valid bet amount");
  if (bet > balance) return alert("Insufficient balance");

  balance -= bet;
  saveBalance();

  const boostedIndex = weightedFavouriteBoost();

  raceInProgress = true;

  document.getElementById("raceModal").classList.add("show");
  document.getElementById("closeRaceBtn").style.display = "none";
  document.getElementById("raceSummary").textContent =
    `Selected: Barrier ${horses[selected].barrier} - ${horses[selected].name} | Bet: ${formatMoney(bet)}`;

  buildTrack(raceTrack);
  resetRaceStats(boostedIndex);
  updateHorseVisuals();

  callRace("Horses are loaded into the barriers...");
  sound(300, 0.15);

  setTimeout(() => {
    callRace("Red light flashing...");
    flashLights(raceTrack);
    sound(420, 0.15);
  }, 700);

  setTimeout(() => {
    callRace("3...");
    sound(400, 0.12);

    setTimeout(() => {
      callRace("2...");
      sound(400, 0.12);
    }, 900);

    setTimeout(() => {
      callRace("1...");
      sound(400, 0.12);
    }, 1800);

    setTimeout(() => {
      callRace("They're off!");
      stopLights(raceTrack);
      sound(700, 0.22, "square");
      runLiveRace(selected, bet);
    }, 2700);

  }, 2200);
}

function runLiveRace(selected, bet) {
  let lastTime = performance.now();
  let startTime = lastTime;
  let lastCommentaryTime = 0;
  let lastLeaderIndex = -1;
  let winnerIndex = null;

  function frame(now) {
    const dt = (now - lastTime) / 1000;
    const elapsed = now - startTime;
    lastTime = now;

    horses.forEach((horse, i) => {
      const raceProgress = Math.min(horse.position / 100, 1);

      let phaseBoost = 1;

      if (raceProgress < 0.25) {
        phaseBoost = 1.05 + Math.random() * 0.08;
      } else if (raceProgress < 0.75) {
        phaseBoost = horse.energy;
      } else {
        phaseBoost = horse.finishingKick;
      }

      const randomness = 0.85 + Math.random() * 0.30;
      const pace = horse.speed * phaseBoost * randomness;

      horse.position += pace * dt * 8.8;

      if (horse.position > 100) horse.position = 100;
    });

    updateHorseVisuals();

    if (elapsed - lastCommentaryTime > 1700) {
      lastLeaderIndex = liveRaceCommentary(elapsed, lastLeaderIndex);
      lastCommentaryTime = elapsed;
    }

    const order = getLeaderOrder();

    if (order[0].position >= 100 && elapsed > 7000) {
      winnerIndex = order[0].index;
      finishLiveRace(selected, winnerIndex, bet);
      return;
    }

    if (elapsed > 13000) {
      winnerIndex = order[0].index;
      horses[winnerIndex].position = 100;
      updateHorseVisuals();
      finishLiveRace(selected, winnerIndex, bet);
      return;
    }

    requestAnimationFrame(frame);
  }

  requestAnimationFrame(frame);
}

function finishLiveRace(selected, winner, bet) {
  const order = getLeaderOrder();
  const first = order[0];
  const second = order[1];
  const photoFinish = Math.abs(first.position - second.position) < 1.5;

  if (photoFinish) {
    callRace("📸 PHOTO FINISH!");
    raceCaller.classList.add("photo-finish");
    sound(900, 0.25, "sawtooth");

    setTimeout(() => {
      raceCaller.classList.remove("photo-finish");
      finishRace(selected, winner, bet);
    }, 1600);
  } else {
    callRace(`${horses[winner].name} is driving hard at the line!`);
    setTimeout(() => finishRace(selected, winner, bet), 700);
  }
}

function finishRace(selected, winner, bet) {
  let winnings = 0;

  if (selected === winner) {
    winnings = bet * horses[winner].odds;
    balance += winnings;
    saveBalance();

    sound(1000, 0.15);
    setTimeout(() => sound(1300, 0.2), 160);

    if (horses[winner].odds > 10) {
      showBigWin(winnings);
    }
  } else {
    sound(180, 0.25, "triangle");
  }

  history.unshift({
    winner: `Barrier ${horses[winner].barrier} - ${horses[winner].name}`,
    odds: formatMoney(horses[winner].odds),
    picked: `Barrier ${horses[selected].barrier} - ${horses[selected].name}`,
    winnings: winnings.toFixed(2)
  });

  history = history.slice(0, 5);
  localStorage.setItem("history", JSON.stringify(history));

  callRace(`🏆 ${horses[winner].name} wins!`);

  document.getElementById("raceSummary").textContent =
    `Winner: Barrier ${horses[winner].barrier} - ${horses[winner].name} (${formatMoney(horses[winner].odds)}) | Your pick: ${horses[selected].name} | Winnings: ${formatMoney(winnings)}`;

  document.getElementById("closeRaceBtn").style.display = "inline-block";
  raceInProgress = false;

  setupRace();
}

function showBigWin(amount) {
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.className = "big-win";
  div.textContent = `BIG WIN! ${formatMoney(amount)}`;
  document.body.appendChild(div);
  setTimeout(() => div.remove(), 1400);
}

function topUp() {
  const now = Date.now();

  if (lastTopUp && now - lastTopUp < 86400000) {
    alert("Only 1 free top is allowed within 24 hours. Please wait and try again later");
    return;
  }

  balance += 50;
  lastTopUp = now;
  localStorage.setItem("lastTopUp", lastTopUp);
  saveBalance();
}

function openHistory() {
  const content = document.getElementById("historyContent");

  content.innerHTML = history.length
    ? history.map(h => `
      <div class="history-entry">
        🏁 Winner: ${h.winner} (${h.odds})<br>
        🎯 Picked: ${h.picked}<br>
        💰 Winnings: $${h.winnings}
      </div>
    `).join("")
    : "<p>No races yet.</p>";

  document.getElementById("historyModal").classList.add("show");
}

function closeHistory() {
  document.getElementById("historyModal").classList.remove("show");
}

function closeRace() {
  if (!raceInProgress) {
    document.getElementById("raceModal").classList.remove("show");
  }
}

horseSelect.addEventListener("change", updatePayout);
betInput.addEventListener("input", updatePayout);

saveBalance();
setupRace();
</script>

</body>
</html>

This version now has actual live movement logic, so the commentary is based on who is really leading during the race.


You said:

This is so ace.... I have one final thought please mate... What would be perfect is a "form guide" section in the top left hand corner.... It would show each runner and a description of their "personality... It doesnt mean that the "best" horse wins the race (it is random after all) it just gives the punter more information to make a bet!

ChatGPT said:

Yes mate — brilliant idea.

A Form Guide would be perfect there, and it won’t need to affect the race result at all. It can be flavour text only, like:

1. Champagne Calling — Fast beginner, can fade late
2. Uluru — Strong finisher, loves a late charge
3. Sassy Rebel — Unpredictable, all or nothing type

Best setup:

  • Add a Form Guide button/box in the top-left

  • Each race, every runner gets a random personality

  • Personality appears in the form guide

  • Odds and race randomness remain exactly as they are

Example personalities:

JavaScript
const personalities = [
  "Fast beginner, but can fade late",
  "Strong finisher who loves a late charge",
  "Unpredictable runner with plenty of attitude",
  "Consistent type who rarely runs a bad race",
  "Slow starter but dangerous if close late",
  "Front-runner who likes to control the race",
  "Big odds, big personality, anything can happen",
  "Needs luck in running, but has a strong finish"
];

Then each horse gets:

JavaScript
personality: personalities[Math.floor(Math.random() * personalities.length)]

And it displays in a top-left panel.

I’d keep it clearly cosmetic so the user knows it’s “form flavour”, not guaranteed prediction.


You said:

yes - lets do it

ChatGPT said:

Great call — I’ll add the form guide as flavour information only, so it helps the player “feel” like they’re reading the race without making the best-sounding horse automatically win.

Yes mate — add this.

1. Add this CSS before </style>

CSS
.form-guide-panel {
  position: fixed;
  top: 12px;
  left: 12px;
  width: 280px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  padding: 12px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  z-index: 100;
  text-align: left;
  font-size: 13px;
}

.form-guide-panel h3 {
  margin: 0 0 8px;
  color: gold;
}

.form-runner {
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  line-height: 1.35;
}
